name: My Holiday 2
short_description: This is the second part of the long holiday of labor and capital! It tells the story of the protagonist's return to his hometown in the summer vacation three years after his previous work, but he is invaded by the meow man.
detailed_description:
Brief introduction: [/]

—————————————————————————————————————————————

This is the second work of the long vacation. It tells the story of the invasion of the great meow man

when he returned home from the summer vacation three years later.

There are 22 combat characters that can be unlocked in this book. Each character has two different styles of classes to choose from,

Art, combat and system, are much better than before, is a decent RPG game! Egg pain escalated!!

In other words, I'm introducing the writing of these things. Besides the audit, does anyone really read it?
